touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn outreach to Leo Roberts at PearlVentures introducing our conversation intelligence platform. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Leo Roberts. Left voicemail introducing our solution for sales-to-CS handoff automation. No callback.
Follow-up cold call to Leo Roberts. Reached voicemail, mentioned previous outreach and offered demo slot. No response.
Third cold call attempt. Left brief message referencing value prop for fintech sales teams. No callback received.
Follow-up email to Leo after multiple voicemails. Shared case study on sales handoff automation for fintech. Leo responded expressing interest in learning more.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform compare to Fathom for our use case?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform specializes in sales-to-CS handoff with deeper CRM integration and automated summary routing, while Fathom focuses more on note-taking. Happy to show you side-by-side.

touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Leo with additional ROI calculator for conversation intelligence. No response.
Follow-up email with link to product demo video focused on handoff workflows. No response received.

Discovery call with Leo Roberts (19 min). Discussed current sales-to-CS handoff pain points at PearlVentures. Team manually transfers context from 50+ sales calls per week. Leo mentioned they're also evaluating Fathom but concerned about integration depth.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for transferring deal context from sales to customer success?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual. Reps fill out a handoff doc template, but it's inconsistent and CS often has to re-ask questions.

questions_asked.question: How many seats would you need for the sales and CS teams?
questions_asked.answer: Probably around 10 to start—5 AEs and 5 CSMs.

questions_asked.question: Can your system automatically route summaries to our CS workspace in HubSpot?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native HubSpot integration that pushes structured summaries to contact and deal records automatically.

touches.ai_summary: Email sent to Leo with pricing overview and comparison sheet. No response tracked.
Brief call with Leo (8 min) to confirm demo attendees and timing. Leo confirmed he'll bring Ravi Allen from implementation. Expressed interest in seeing automation features.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the summary fields that get sent to CS?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely—you can configure custom fields and map them to your CRM properties.

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Leo Roberts and Ravi Allen (47 min). Walked through sales call recording, AI summarization, and automated handoff to CS. Ravi asked detailed questions about data security and HubSpot field mapping. Leo seemed positive but noted budget constraints and mentioned Fathom's pricing is lower. Demo was originally scheduled earlier but rescheduled due to Leo's conflict.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and where are recordings stored?
questions_asked.answer: Recordings are stored in SOC 2 compliant AWS servers, retained per your policy (default 2 years), and you own all data with export options.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 10 seats with HubSpot, usually 1-2 weeks including training.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this on your side?
questions_asked.answer: Probably just Leo and I for now. I'll handle the technical setup.

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing structure for unlimited automation features?
questions_asked.answer: That's included in our Growth tier at $12,000 annually for 10 seats, which breaks down to $100/seat/month.

objections: Fathom's pricing is significantly lower and our budget is tight this quarter.
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Leo with formal proposal for 10 seats, unlimited automation tier. Included ROI breakdown showing time savings. Leo responded asking if there's flexibility on pricing given their budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room to move on price? We're at $12K but our budget approval is closer to $7K.
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with my manager. We want to make this work for you.

next_steps: Revised proposal by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Email thread with Leo on revised proposal at $6,500 ACV (40% discount) to meet budget constraints. Leo confirmed this works and will move forward with contract review. Asked about implementation timeline with Ravi.

questions_asked.question: Can we get started next month once the contract is signed?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can kick off implementation as soon as paperwork is complete. I'll connect you with our onboarding team.
